title: Predicting the type of polymerisation
summary: 9701 A Level — choosing addition vs condensation from monomer structure.
learningObjectives: Draw repeat units with correct linkages.
Deduce monomers from a polymer section.

simpleExplanation.title: Which polymerisation?
simpleExplanation.summary: C=C gives addition; two complementary functional groups give condensation with small molecule loss.
steps: Repeat unit includes atoms from both monomers.

sections.content: **Predicting polymerisation type** (35.2) follows **35.1 condensation**. Examiners often give **one repeat unit** and ask for **monomers**.
